scanner_definitions.Bug6: authority_drift_scanner — scans for Odin subsystems acquiring forbidden authority.
scanner_definitions.Q7: boundary_coherence_scanner — scans for inconsistent claim boundaries and missing not_proven lists.

axioms: Bug6 and Q7 are release-boundary lenses only.
They do not create independent agent authority.
They do not have runtime execution authority.
Public wording uses neutral Odin terms.

Bug6.description: Scans for any Odin subsystem acquiring authority it is not permitted to hold.
Bug6.repo_evidence: odin/operational_spine/ — all outputs carry candidate_only: true and app_owned_apply: true.
Bug6.release_gate: No authority drift detected in current PR09/PR10 operational spine.

Q7.description: Scans for boundary incoherence across Odin subsystems — mismatched claim boundaries, missing not_proven lists, or inconsistent candidate_only flags.
Q7.repo_evidence: All proof packets in reports/ include not_proven and claim_boundary.
Q7.release_gate: No boundary incoherence detected in current PR09/PR10 release artifacts.

ring_drift.description: Occurs when a lower authority ring acts as if it holds higher ring authority.
ring_drift.repo_evidence: Ring 0 (host app) owns apply. Odin Rings 1-7 are candidate-only.
ring_drift.release_gate: Ring authority map validates clean separation. Ring 0 owns apply.

projection_truth_drift.description: Occurs when model output is treated as ground truth without critic/final gate receipt.
projection_truth_drift.release_gate: Model projection not truth enforced in ModelWorkPacket and final gate.

apply_drift.description: Occurs when Odin attempts to directly mutate app state without host app authorization.
apply_drift.repo_evidence: No app state mutation paths in odin/operational_spine/ or odin/release_boundaries/.
apply_drift.release_gate: No app state mutation detected. app_owned_apply: true enforced.

send_drift.description: Occurs when Odin attempts external send without explicit host app receipt.
send_drift.release_gate: No external send paths active. Local-only default enforced.

provider_drift.description: Occurs when provider output is treated as authoritative without final gate.
provider_drift.repo_evidence: odin/operational_spine/provider_seam.py — provider_execution: false. Provider is not authority.
provider_drift.release_gate: Provider not authority enforced. Provider seam disabled by default.

qirc_drift.description: Occurs when QIRC bus events are treated as app authority or cause app state mutation.
qirc_drift.repo_evidence: odin/qirc_core/ — local_only: true; no app state mutation paths.
qirc_drift.release_gate: QIRC not app authority enforced. Local-only QIRC bus confirmed.

artifact_drift.description: Occurs when historical or target-only documents are cited as proof of current runtime behavior.
artifact_drift.repo_evidence: Artifact currency index classifies docs as current_runtime, historical_supporting, or target_only.
artifact_drift.release_gate: Artifact currency classification enforced. Historical/target docs not current proof.

claim_drift.description: Occurs when a claim is made without a scoped receipt from the system asserting it.
claim_drift.repo_evidence: All PR09/PR10 proof packets include not_proven and claim_boundary.
claim_drift.release_gate: Receipt before claim enforced. All overclaims blocked by boundary matrix.
